title: tephrosia purpurea var. angustissima
intro: Tephrosia purpurea var. angustissima, also known as the narrow-leaved tephrosia or narrow-leaved horsefly tree, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood sugar levels, reducing cholesterol, and exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia purpurea var. angustissima include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat conditions such as diabetes, wounds, and skin infections.
